name: Tender Roast Pheasant
recipeInstructions:
1. Stuff the pheasant with bread stuffing, if desired, or sprinkle salt and pepper.
2. Place the pheasant on a rack in a shallow 9 x 9-inch pan.
3. Bake at 350 degrees F for 1 1/4 to 1 1/2 hours, depending on the size of the bird and whether it's stuffed.
4. In a separate bowl, mix butter with hot water until combined. Stir in chicken bouillon cubes.
5. Baste the pheasant every 15 minutes with the butter mixture.
6. After half the cooking time has elapsed, turn the pheasant over.
7. Remove the pheasant and thicken the basting juices with flour to make gravy.
